proof_model.name: EU AI Act Ready™ Proof Layer
proof_model.purpose: Provide integrity, provenance and traceability information for AI governance knowledge and compliance artifacts.

integrity_controls.name: SHA-256 Integrity
integrity_controls.description: Controlled documents and compliance artifacts can be identified through SHA-256 digital fingerprints.

integrity_controls.name: Trusted Timestamp
integrity_controls.description: Document versions can be associated with creation and verification timestamps.

integrity_controls.name: Version Control
integrity_controls.description: Compliance artifacts are managed through controlled versions and states.

evidence_model.name: RRVI Evidence Model
principles: Every compliance statement should have supporting evidence
Every evidence object should reference a controlled document
Every document should belong to a compliance module

rrvi_reference.name: Remote Regulatory Verification Infrastructure™
rrvi_reference.purpose: Structure compliance information into verifiable entities, relationships and evidence objects.
